news.t: Amplify ETFs Declares March Income Distributions for its Income ETFs
The Stocks Goldman Sachs Thinks You Should Own as Iran War Stretches Into a Third Week
Amplify ETFs Launches Amplify HACK Cybersecurity Covered Call ETF (HAKY)

holdings.infoBox: HAKY is an equity ETF with a total of 77 individual holdings. The top holdings are CrowdStrike Holdings stock at 8.10%, Palo Alto Networks at 7.97%, Cisco Systems at 7.17%, Broadcom at 6.76%, and Fortinet at 6.75%.

overview.description: The Amplify HACK Cybersecurity Covered Call ETF (HAKY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund of funds that invests primarily in the Amplify Cybersecurity ETF (HACK), providing exposure to companies involved in cybersecurity and digital infrastructure. The fund seeks to generate income by selling covered call options on its equity holdings while maintaining participation in the cybersecurity equity theme HAKY was launched on Jan 20, 2026 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: The Stocks Goldman Sachs Thinks You Should Own as Iran War Stretches Into a Third Week
data.text: The war in Iran is entering its third week with no end in sight. That, according to Goldman Sachs analysts, warrants some portfolio changes.
